tooltip.emergencyUnlock: Emergency unlock is a special method used when you lose your private key. Requires a 7-day waiting period.
tooltip.normalUnlock: Normal unlock is a standard withdrawal method using Dilithium signatures. Requires a 24-hour waiting period.
tooltip.challenge: A challenge is a dispute filed by an observer against a suspicious unlock request. Successful challenges earn rewards.
tooltip.slashing: Slashing is the mechanism where a prover's stake (collateral) is confiscated for misconduct.
tooltip.riskScore: Risk score evaluates the fraud risk of a transaction from 0-100. Higher scores indicate greater likelihood of fraud.

meta.title: Observer Portal | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Monitor suspicious unlocks and earn rewards. Become an Observer to protect Quantum Shield's security.

hero.title: Find Fraud
hero.description: Quantum Shield has a "waiting period" when users withdraw their assets. As an Observer, you monitor for fraudulent withdrawals during this period. Report fraud successfully and earn rewards.

about.title: What is Quantum Shield & Observer?
about.description: Let's understand how Quantum Shield works and the role of Observers.

whatIsQS.title: What is Quantum Shield?
whatIsQS.description1: Quantum Shield is a security service that protects crypto assets from future quantum computer attacks. Users can "lock" their ETH and other assets for safe storage.
whatIsQS.description2: When withdrawing (unlocking) assets, there's a "waiting period" of 24 hours to 7 days to prevent fraud. Observers monitor during this waiting period to catch any fraudulent withdrawals.
whatIsQS.flow1: User locks assets in Quantum Shield
whatIsQS.flow4: Observer monitors; if no issues, withdrawal completes

whatIsObserver.title: What is an Observer?
whatIsObserver.description1: An Observer is a "guardian" who protects Quantum Shield's security. They review unlock requests during waiting periods and check for fraudulent transactions.
whatIsObserver.description2: If fraud is detected, Observers can file a "dispute". If the dispute is upheld, they receive a portion of the assets confiscated from the fraudster as a reward.
whatIsObserver.role1: Monitor pending unlock requests in real-time
whatIsObserver.role3: Submit disputes for suspected fraudulent transactions
whatIsObserver.role4: Earn rewards when disputes are successful

howItWorks.title: 4 Steps to Earn Rewards
howItWorks.description: Here's how you detect fraud and earn rewards as an Observer.

monitor.title: 1. Monitor Unlocks
monitor.description: View pending unlock requests on your dashboard. AI automatically detects and alerts you to "suspicious transactions".

detect.title: 2. Find Fraud
detect.description: Analyze high-risk transactions like large emergency unlocks, withdrawals from new accounts, and unusual patterns.

dispute.title: 3. File a Dispute
dispute.description: If you determine it's fraud, deposit a bond and submit a "dispute". The Prover gets 48-72 hours to defend.

earn.title: 4. Earn Rewards
earn.description: If your dispute is upheld, your bond is returned plus you receive 60% of the assets confiscated from the fraudster.

rewards.title: Rewards for Successful Disputes
rewards.description: When you discover and report fraud, a portion of the confiscated Prover stake is distributed as rewards.

distribution.title: Confiscated Asset Distribution
distribution.challengerDesc: Reward to the Observer who filed the dispute

example.title: Reward Calculation Example
example.slashNote: ※ For 1 violator. Increases with multiple violations
example.bondReturn: Your bond is also fully returned

warning.title: If Your Dispute Fails
warning.description: If you dispute a legitimate transaction, your deposited bond is forfeited. Only file disputes when you have solid evidence.

requirements.title: Become an Observer
requirements.description: No special qualifications needed, but some preparation is required.

stake.title: Observer Stake
stake.description: No collateral needed to become an Observer. Bond is only required when filing disputes.

bond.title: Dispute Bond
bond.description: Bond deposited when filing a dispute. Returned on success, forfeited on failure.

knowledge.title: Required Knowledge
knowledge.description: Basic blockchain and security knowledge is sufficient. AI provides support.

consumer.title: Consumer App
consumer.description: Protect your assets with quantum-resistant cryptography

prover.title: Prover Network
prover.description: Become a Prover to generate quantum signatures and earn rewards

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Participate in protocol decisions with QS tokens

cta.title: Ready to Become an Observer?
cta.description: Monitor for fraud, protect the network, and earn rewards. No special qualifications required—apply now.

expertQuotes.title: Why Fraud Detection Matters
expertQuotes.subtitle: Insights from security experts

0.quote: Fraud proofs enable open participation where anyone can verify that the chain is secure. With even a single honest verifier, the security of the entire system is guaranteed.
0.author: Vitalik Buterin
0.title: Ethereum Co-founder

1.quote: Optimistic Rollups ensure security by allowing anyone to monitor transactions and submit challenges against fraudulent state transitions.
1.author: Ethereum Foundation
1.title: Official Ethereum Documentation

2.quote: Security is a matter of economic incentive design. By rewarding correct behavior and penalizing fraud, the trustworthiness of decentralized systems is ensured.
2.author: Ed Felten
2.title: Arbitrum Co-founder, Former White House CTO

expertQuotes.disclaimer: The above is for informational purposes only. Please participate as an Observer at your own discretion.

terms.termsIntro: By registering as an Observer, you agree to the following terms:
terms.termsItem1: You are responsible for filing evidence-based disputes when you discover fraudulent transactions
terms.termsItem2: You must deposit a bond when filing a dispute, which will be forfeited if the dispute fails
terms.termsItem3: Filing malicious disputes against legitimate transactions is prohibited
terms.termsItem4: Rewards are only paid upon successful disputes
